nodes.label: DirectHire
nodes.rationale: Autonomous multi-agent recruitment ecosystem where AI Career Agents and Hiring Agents collaborate from application to offer.

nodes.label: Career Agent
nodes.rationale: AI agent representing the candidate.

nodes.label: Hiring Agent
nodes.rationale: AI agent representing the recruiter.

nodes.label: Strategic Aligner Agent
nodes.rationale: Candidate-side agent: resume optimization, job matching, skill gap detection, career alignment analysis, application recommendations.

nodes.label: Proxy Liaison Agent
nodes.rationale: Candidate-side agent handling recruiter communication, interview scheduling, availability management, screening assistance.

nodes.label: Contract Guardian Agent
nodes.rationale: Candidate-side agent for offer review, salary benchmarking, contract analysis, negotiation support.

nodes.label: Job Intelligence Engine
nodes.rationale: Recruiter-side: understand hiring requirements, extract competencies, generate job intelligence.

nodes.label: Resume Intelligence Engine
nodes.rationale: Recruiter-side: resume analysis, candidate evaluation, potential assessment.

nodes.label: Assessment Intelligence Engine
nodes.rationale: Recruiter-side: generate dynamic assessments, customize difficulty, evaluate performance.

nodes.label: Interview Intelligence Engine
nodes.rationale: Recruiter-side interview analysis integrated with EchoHire.

nodes.label: Candidate Ranking Engine
nodes.rationale: Weighted score: Resume 25%, Assessment 30%, Coding 15%, Interview 15%, Reasoning 10%, Growth 5%.

nodes.label: Offer Intelligence Engine
nodes.rationale: Recruiter-side: outputs Hire/Consider/Reject verdict plus salary recommendation and offer confidence.

nodes.label: Agent Communication Layer
nodes.rationale: Shared bus between Career Agent and Hiring Agent exchanging resume intelligence, job requirements, assessment/interview requests, salary expectations, availability.

nodes.label: Design Language
nodes.rationale: Premium, trustworthy, intelligent, modern, enterprise-grade. Inspiration: Linear, Ashby, Arc Browser, Mercury, Vercel, Ramp.

nodes.label: Design Tokens
nodes.rationale: Primary #adc6ff, Secondary #d0bcff, Accent #ffb95f, Background #0c1324, Surface #151b2d, Text #dce1fb. Typography: Sora headings, Geist body, JetBrains Mono metadata.

nodes.label: Motion Philosophy
nodes.rationale: Motion explains, guides, reinforces hierarchy. Never distracts. Three levels: micro 100-200ms, interface 300-600ms, narrative 800-1500ms.

nodes.label: Candidate Dashboard
nodes.rationale: Sections: Overview, Applications, Interviews, Offers, Career Agent.

nodes.label: Recruiter Dashboard
nodes.rationale: Sections: Jobs, Candidates, Assessments, Interviews, Offers, Hiring Agent.

nodes.label: Landing Page Hero
nodes.rationale: Hero copy: 'Your AI Hiring Team. Working Before Humans Even Meet.' Animation flow: Candidate -> Career Agent -> Assessment -> Hiring Agent -> Recruiter.

nodes.label: Performance Targets
nodes.rationale: Lighthouse 95+, 60 FPS, mobile optimized.

nodes.label: Modular Monolith Architecture
nodes.rationale: Chosen architecture: modular monolith. Reason: fast development, easy deployment, minimal DevOps, fewer integration issues, hackathon-suitable. Designed so services can be extracted later.

nodes.label: Frontend Structure
nodes.rationale: apps/candidate, apps/recruiter, shared (components, hooks, services, theme).

nodes.label: Backend Structure
nodes.rationale: apps: auth, candidate, recruiter, agents, assessment, interview, analytics.

nodes.label: API Structure
nodes.rationale: Candidate: /api/candidate/*, Recruiter: /api/recruiter/*, Agents: /api/agents/{match,schedule,negotiate,analyze}.

nodes.label: Database Collections
nodes.rationale: users, jobs, applications, resumes, assessments, interviews, offers, agent_events.

nodes.label: Git Strategy
nodes.rationale: Branches main, develop, candidate-dev, recruiter-dev. Workflow: feature -> develop -> main.

nodes.label: Deployment Targets
nodes.rationale: Frontend Vercel, Backend Railway, Database MongoDB Atlas.

nodes.label: Future Service Extraction
nodes.rationale: candidate-service, recruiter-service, assessment-service, interview-service, agent-service. Current architecture designed to allow this.

nodes.label: Tech Stack
nodes.rationale: React+Vite frontend, FastAPI+Motor backend, MongoDB Atlas, Hybrid AI (Gemma, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Ollama STT/TTS via LangChain), Vercel/Railway deployment.

nodes.label: Phase 9 Notification System
nodes.rationale: User notifications via email (SMTP), later WebSocket + Push. Triggers on application, interview, assessment, offer events.

nodes.label: Phase 8 AI Mock Interview
nodes.rationale: Hugging Face Whisper Large v3 STT + Gemini Brain & TTS voice interview engine.

nodes.label: Agent Orchestrator
nodes.rationale: The Bus: /api/agents/{match,schedule,negotiate,analyze,screen,rank,assess,draft-offer}.

nodes.label: Agent Data Flow
nodes.rationale: Candidate app -> Career Agent; Recruiter app -> Hiring Agent; Agent Bus coordinates Career Agent <-> Hiring Agent for match, schedule, negotiate.

nodes.label: Phase Completion Status
nodes.rationale: Phases 1-12 marked complete; Phase 13 (Deployment) pending Vercel/Railway deploys.

nodes.label: Shared System + Auth + Landing Spec
nodes.rationale: Spec for building frontend/shared package, landing page, and full auth flow with FastAPI/JWT.

nodes.label: JWT Security (HS256, bcrypt)
nodes.rationale: 1-day access tokens, bcrypt password hashing, OAuth2PasswordBearer.

nodes.label: Axios JWT Interceptor
nodes.rationale: Injects Authorization Bearer token from localStorage; redirects to /login on 401.

nodes.label: Landing Hero Animation
nodes.rationale: Headline 'Hiring, Handled by Intelligence.' with typewriter subtitle, gradient orbs, agent communication flow visualization.

nodes.label: DirectHire Value Proposition
nodes.rationale: Not a job board; an autonomous hiring ecosystem where Career Agents and Hiring Agents collaborate while keeping humans in control.

links.rationale: Resume Intelligence is an explicit 25% input to the Candidate Ranking formula.
Assessment is an explicit 30% input to the Candidate Ranking formula.
Interview is an explicit 15% input to the Candidate Ranking formula.
Ranking output feeds Offer Intelligence for Hire/Consider/Reject decision.
DRD tokens are the single source of truth that shared package implements.
Motion philosophy governs how tokens (colors, type) are animated.
Lighthouse/60FPS targets justify the bounded motion duration philosophy.
Screenshot of candidate app showing live dashboard UI.
Screenshot of recruiter app showing live dashboard UI.
Modular monolith is the chosen architecture because it allows later service extraction.
openai, anthropic, langchain, langchain-openai, google-generativeai, huggingface-hub, aiosmtplib support the agent orchestration layer.
requirements.txt pins python-jose and passlib[bcrypt] which implement the JWT/bcrypt security plan.
